workflow_name: Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path
user_message: Can you extract the deployment blockers from this exec meeting notes for Parnell Aerospace? Multiple stakeholders are involved -- it's complex.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-20 10:08 EST
Subject: deployment blockers - Action Required

There's been a change in our timeline for deployment blockers. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
Date: 2024-01-16 09:34 EST
Subject: URGENT: deployment blockers Issue at Parnell Aerospace

Just checking in on the deployment blockers proposal. Our VP Operations is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Parnell Aerospace: the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk

required_artifacts: path forward with MACC/funding options if applicable

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF35-K trap (Strict read-only on contract data when staging an obvious update would help); produces complete Contract state summary with freshness, forecast impact with confidence, response draft (no commercia
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF35-K failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF35-K failure mode (Strict read-only on contract data when staging an obvious update would help)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct deployment blockers decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
